CREATE TABLE time_data (startdate TIMESTAMPTZ, enddate TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT date_sub('hour', startdate, enddate) AS hour_diff FROM time_data;
CREATE TABLE user_activity (user_id INT, activity_date TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO user_activity VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-09-30 08:00:00'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '1992-10-01 09:15:00');
SELECT user_id, date_sub('hour', MIN(activity_date), MAX(activity_date)) AS activity_duration FROM user_activity GROUP BY user_id;
WITH time_range AS (SELECT TIMESTAMPTZ '2022-01-01 00:00:00' AS start, TIMESTAMPTZ '2022-01-02 00:00:00' AS end) SELECT date_sub('day', start, end) AS day_diff FROM time_range;
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '1993-01-01 12:00:00'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '1993-01-01 14:30:00'), (3, TIMESTAMPTZ '1993-01-01 15:45:00');
SELECT event_id, date_sub('minute', TIMESTAMPTZ '1993-01-01 12:30:00', event_time) AS time_diff FROM events WHERE time_diff > 0;
CREATE TABLE multi_time_data (activity_id INT, start_date TIMESTAMPTZ, end_date TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO multi_time_data VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2022-01-01 10:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2022-01-01 12:00:00'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '2022-01-02 10:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2022-01-02 13:00:00');
SELECT activity_id, date_sub('hour', start_date, end_date) AS partition_diff FROM multi_time_data WHERE partition_diff = 2;
